hover-states.summary: All3 hover assertions passed. Album cover scales ~2% with 500ms ease-out. Reroll button shows brightness(1.05) on hover. Age filter shows accent background on hover.

loading-animations.summary: Both loading spin animations passed. Shuffle icon spins on reroll, RefreshCcw icon spins during catalog refresh.

button-states.summary: All3 button state assertions passed. Disabled state shows opacity-60 and pointer-events-none. Focus rings visible via focus-visible classes.

animations.summary: Both animation assertions passed. Age filter indicator slides with 200ms ease-out. Accordion expands 240ms ease-out, collapses 200ms ease-in.
